attributes.readMe:
## surfacePopoverBinding Element modifier installed on each hover-target unit (grid cell, canvas node, kanban card, calendar event — whatever the host considers "popover-able") that wires the desktop popover gesture model to a shared `PopoverState`. Reads in: a `PopoverState` (one per surface root) + a per-unit `PopoverContract` (which kinds the unit supports) + the unit's `(row, col)` coordinates + optional `onSelect` / `onActivate` host hooks. Wires out: `pointerenter` / `pointerleave` / `click` / `dblclick` on the modified element, translating DOM events into `state.scheduleHoverDetails` / `scheduleDismissDetails` / `openEdit`. It does not paint, read tracked state, draw chrome, set focus, or own keyboard nav — those stay with the host and the `` element itself. ```gts import surfacePopoverBinding from '../modifiers/popover-binding';
…
```
attributes.cardDescription: Element modifier wiring per-unit pointer/click gestures to a shared PopoverState — the host-agnostic input side of the popover hover/click/escalate flow.
